element.hint: Color of connection lines between nodes
element.label: Link color
element.name: link_color

element.hint: Allow users to drag and reposition individual nodes
element.label: Draggable Nodes
element.name: draggable

element.hint: Data field name to dynamically determine link width
element.label: Links width field
element.name: link_width_field

element.hint: Force simulation charge (negative = repel, higher magnitude = stronger)
element.label: Charge Strength
element.name: charge_strength

element.hint: Default radius of network nodes in pixels
element.label: Node radius
element.name: node_radius

element.hint: Default fill color for network nodes
element.label: Default node color
element.name: node_color

element.hint: Preferred distance between connected nodes in pixels
element.label: Link Distance
element.name: link_distance

element.hint: Width of connection lines between nodes in pixels
element.label: Link width
element.name: link_width

element.hint: Font size for node labels in pixels
element.label: Label Font Size
element.name: label_font_size
